message:
✨ Add comprehensive internal links footer to all 29 landing pages (#2203)

Googlebot has only indexed the homepage despite 29 URLs in sitemap.
Root cause: the nav only linked to 4 pages, so crawler couldn't
discover the other 25 routes.

- Replace minimal footer with 5-column link grid in all 29 landing pages
- Every page now links to all 28 other dashboard routes (37 internal links)
- Add responsive CSS for footer columns (5-col → 2-col → 1-col)
- Creates a full internal link graph for crawler discovery

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
